headline.text: L2 FFS overweight bags kicked *75+ per hour* on bucket malfunction — line also down 40 minutes on photo-eye calibration.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 2 had a belt contamination scare overnight that forced a new work order and full restart by 02:56. Sollich 4 dialed in viscosity after switching to 714 lb batch size and landed at 223°F. Sollich 3 cleaned a stuck belt guide and flagged a capper speed setting issue.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS line struggled with overweight bags — bucket 1 vibrating abnormally, bucket 12 overfilling — and kicked 75+ bags per hour through end of window. Film change at 03:07 took 40 minutes to recalibrate photo eye. ML3 has been in cleaning since 10:00 yesterday; wash caddy top valve faulting overnight.
per_plant_summary.L3: Truffle line lost dark chocolate pump motor at 04:00 and delayed tempering 45 minutes; cleared by maintenance. First shift found metal detector belt off, hoses disconnected, and rails misaligned — 17 bins accumulated at startup. Flow wrap inventory low: only 2 partial rolls staged.

notes.text: WIP label mismatch flagged: package printed 63J but IMS label showed 63H on first pallet of 21139.
Bay door #1 is off track; ADS called for parts and repair.

resolved.title: Tunnel 2 caramel buildup led to belt floor-contact concern
resolved.summary: Significant caramel accumulation on Tunnel 2 rollers discovered at shift start; cleaning disassembly raised QA concern that belt touched floor before reassembly.
resolved.resolution: Line stopped, almonds emptied, belt cleaned, 3 ATPs passed, new work orders issued, and line restarted at 02:56.

resolved.title: Sollich 4 mixing tank not blending 1,000 lb batches
resolved.summary: Ingredients not mixing properly in new tank at full batch size; viscosity inconsistent and below target through multiple cook cycles.
resolved.resolution: Reduced batch size to 714 lb, adjusted cook temp to 223°F, and landed in-spec viscosity (30,700–34,000 cP) by end of window.

resolved.title: Equipment ATP failures on new/old equipment
resolved.summary: Equipment did not pass 2nd or 3rd ATP test after cleaning.
resolved.resolution: 2nd and 3rd cleaning completed with passed ATP results and sponge samples collected at 22:42.

resolved.title: C2 belt guide damaging product on Sollich 3
resolved.summary: White plastic strip missing a bolt caused pieces to slide underneath and get damaged; excessive scrap reported.
resolved.resolution: Cleared in 3 minutes — maintenance fixed the guide and line restarted at 21:52.

resolved.title: FFS photo eye out of calibration after film change
resolved.summary: Film change at 03:07 triggered print mark and photo eye issues; maintenance called.
resolved.resolution: Line up at 03:16 — 40 minutes down for recalibration.

resolved.title: FFS down waiting for product
resolved.summary: Packaging line stopped at 10:42 with no WIP available to run.

resolved.title: FFS paused to separate 2 lots
resolved.summary: Line stopped to segregate mixed lot codes on 1st shift.
resolved.resolution: Lots separated and line restarted at 12:07 — 23 minutes down.

resolved.title: Dark chocolate pump motor not functioning
resolved.summary: Motor on dark chocolate tank would not send chocolate to temper tank and gave no error code; delayed 04:00 tempering start.
resolved.resolution: Nelson Cook cleared — pump running at 04:14. Tempering started at 04:45.

resolved.title: MFM buckets not opening
resolved.summary: Multiple buckets failing to open on MF Matrix; maintenance called at 08:51.
resolved.resolution: Nathan Ruiz made adjustments; running well with no stuck buckets by 09:31.

resolved.title: Sollich 1 enrober screw drive faulted
resolved.summary: Enrober screw drive on Truffle line threw fault at 02:28; maintenance en route.
resolved.resolution: Faults removed by maintenance at 05:11 — Jose Vasquez confirmed cleared.

resolved.title: Cute cavanna cutter malfunction
resolved.summary: Cutter on Truffle line failed; maintenance called at 04:17.
resolved.resolution: Running at reduced speed (10 minutes per box) by 05:02.

resolved.title: Guillotine fault on Truffle line
resolved.summary: Guillotine threw fault at 05:35; maintenance called.
resolved.resolution: Fixed by Jose Vasquez at 05:40 — 5 minutes down.

resolved.title: Truffle line startup: metal detector belt off, hoses disconnected, rails misaligned
resolved.summary: First shift arrived to find metal detector belt off track, hoses disconnected, belt loose, and rails out of alignment — 17 bins of product accumulated during fixes.
resolved.resolution: Issues corrected and product through metal detector by 06:35; line running.

resolved.title: Pallet spec incorrect for FG-30903 rotation
resolved.summary: Pallet placement spec did not match current order requirements; floor flagged rotation error.
resolved.resolution: Rafael updated spec in SafetyChain, Angel printed and distributed to team by 16:38.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 decorator nozzles plugged, BAR pushing 4
needs_attention.summary: Multiple decorator nozzles plugged; BAR (presumed viscosity or pressure metric) at 4 and climbing; Joseph Scott planned a reheat.
needs_attention.status: Joseph noted intent to take a reheat at 04:38; no confirmation of execution or outcome.

needs_attention.title: Belt after metal detector stopping repeatedly on Sollich 3
needs_attention.summary: Belt after MD stopped multiple times; crew cleaned rollers at 05:25.
needs_attention.status: Rollers cleaned; no follow-up on whether stops continued.

needs_attention.title: Bay door #1 off track
needs_attention.summary: Bay door sections bent and door off track; ADS called to order parts.
needs_attention.status: Parts ordered; no ETA from ADS as of 14:55.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 capper conveyor speed set to 60 Hz vs. 45 Hz centerline
needs_attention.summary: Capper belt found running at 60 Hz instead of 45 Hz centerline; likely cause of overfeeding and timing issues.
needs_attention.status: Troy flagged at shift start; no confirmation of correction or whether speed was reset to 45 Hz.

needs_attention.title: FFS kicking 75+ overweight bags per hour — bucket vibration and overfill
needs_attention.summary: Bucket 1 vibrating abnormally, bucket 12 overfilling and not emptying; bags hitting high 30s and low 40s piece count vs. 17–19 spec.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance requested at 01:04; no resolution by end of window. Zack posted images of plate 2 and bucket 12 at 05:55.

needs_attention.title: ML3 down for cleaning since 10:00 yesterday
needs_attention.summary: Molding Line 3 ran out of caramel at 10:00 on 7/16 and entered Level 3 cleaning; no restart signal by end of window.
needs_attention.status: Cleaning plan posted at 13:03; no update on completion or restart as of 07:16.

needs_attention.title: ML3 wash caddy top valve faulting
needs_attention.summary: Top valve on wash caddy not turning and throwing faults at start of 3rd shift.
needs_attention.status: Flagged at 04:21; no follow-up on repair or workaround.

needs_attention.title: Flow wrap inventory low — only 2 partial rolls staged
needs_attention.summary: Truffle line has no flow wrap staged except 2 partial rolls and what is loaded in the machine.
needs_attention.status: Flagged at 06:59; no restocking update by end of window.
